title: Optimize EKS costs with Spot + Karpenter consolidation
scenario: Your EKS cluster runs 100% On-Demand nodes. Cost is $18k/month. The team wants to cut costs by 60% using Karpenter Spot for stateless workloads. Create two NodePools: `stateless-spot` (Spot capacity, t3/m5/m6i families, consolidation enabled) and `stateful-ondemand` (On-Demand only, no consolidation).
starterYaml:
apiVersion: karpenter.sh/v1
kind: NodePool
metadata:
  name: default-pool
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      requirements:
        - key: karpenter.sh/capacity-type
          operator: In
          values: ["on-demand"]
      nodeClassRef:
        group: karpenter.k8s.aws
        kind: EC2NodeClass
        name: default
  disruption:
    consolidationPolicy: WhenEmpty
    consolidateAfter: 30m

hints.text: You need two separate NodePools. The first (`stateless-spot`) should have `capacity-type: spot` and `consolidationPolicy: WhenEmptyOrUnderutilized`. The second (`stateful-ondemand`) should have `capacity-type: on-demand` and `WhenEmpty` or no consolidation.
Use `---` to separate the two YAML documents. Both NodePools reference `nodeClassRef.name: default`. Set `consolidateAfter: 10m` on the spot pool for aggressive consolidation.

stateless-spot spec:
```yaml
requirements:
  - key: karpenter.sh/capacity-type
    operator: In
    values: ["spot"]
disruption:
  consolidationPolicy: WhenEmptyOrUnderutilized
  consolidateAfter: 10m
```
stateful-ondemand spec:
```yaml
requirements:
  - key: karpenter.sh/capacity-type
    operator: In
    values: ["on-demand"]
disruption:
  consolidationPolicy: WhenEmpty
  consolidateAfter: 30m
```

solution:
apiVersion: karpenter.sh/v1
kind: NodePool
metadata:
  name: stateless-spot
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      requirements:
        - key: karpenter.sh/capacity-type
          operator: In
          values: ["spot"]
      nodeClassRef:
        group: karpenter.k8s.aws
        kind: EC2NodeClass
        name: default
  disruption:
    consolidationPolicy: WhenEmptyOrUnderutilized
    consolidateAfter: 10m
---
apiVersion: karpenter.sh/v1
kind: NodePool
metadata:
  name: stateful-ondemand
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      requirements:
        - key: karpenter.sh/capacity-type
          operator: In
          values: ["on-demand"]
      nodeClassRef:
        group: karpenter.k8s.aws
        kind: EC2NodeClass
        name: default
  disruption:
    consolidationPolicy: WhenEmpty
    consolidateAfter: 30m
